title: Note
description: A published knowledge-note entity for Hall of Knowledge. Canonical public source lives under content/knowledge/**/*.json — see docs/design/Hall of Knowledge — Publishing Boundary & Privacy Checklist.md for the authoring/privacy rules this schema enforces structurally.

body.description: Markdown-formatted text. A plain string field today (no frontmatter/file parsing) — see the publishing-boundary doc for why, and for how a future Markdown importer is expected to produce this same field without changing the schema. maxLength is a generous sanity ceiling (roughly 6-10x today's longest sample note), meant to catch a runaway/malformed import, not to constrain genuine writing.

districtId.description: Required — a published note with no district has no artifact route (getKnowledgeNoteArtifactPath returns undefined without one), leaving it unreachable from the UI and Terminal. Kept as a generic x-ref (not locked to hall-of-knowledge specifically) for the same reason repositories/certifications aren't locked to their district — consistent with the project's existing anti-hardcoding convention.

source.description: Free-text provenance note (e.g. "adapted from personal lab notes") — never a filesystem path (POSIX or Windows-style).
